name: Bacon and Cheese Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 quart Chef-Mate Bacon 'n Cheddar Cheese Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients thoroughly until well combined.
2. Chill the dressing in a covered container for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
3. Serve over salad greens or your favorite salad mix.
Makes approximately 2 quarts and yields about 1 1/2 cups of dressing per serving.
